warheads.name: DF-5B Warhead
warheads.description: Large thermonuclear warhead for DF-5B ICBM. Estimated 4-5 Mt yield. 2-3 MIRVs possible.

warheads.name: DF-41 MIRV warhead
warheads.description: MIRV warhead for DF-41. Estimated 150-200 kt per RV. Up to 10 warheads per missile.

warheads.name: DF-31AG Warhead
warheads.description: Single warhead for DF-31AG mobile ICBM. Estimated 150-200 kt. Road-mobile survivability.

warheads.name: DF-26 Warhead
warheads.description: Warhead for DF-26 IRBM. Estimated 1-2 Mt. Dual-capable (nuclear/conventional).

warheads.name: JL-2 Warhead
warheads.description: SLBM warhead for JL-2 on Type-094 submarines. Estimated 250-1000 kt. 3 MIRVs possible.

warheads.name: JL-3 Warhead
warheads.description: SLBM warhead for JL-3 on Type-096 submarines. Estimated 150 kt. Up to 8 MIRVs.

warheads.name: DF-21A Warhead
warheads.description: Warhead for DF-21A MRBM. Estimated 200-300 kt. Theater strike capability.

warheads.name: DF-17 HGV Warhead
warheads.description: Warhead on DF-ZF hypersonic glide vehicle, carried by DF-17. Estimated 250 kt.

delivery_systems.name: DF-5B (CSS-4 Mod 3)
delivery_systems.description: Heavy silo-based ICBM. MIRVed with 2-3 warheads. Liquid-fueled, 30-minute launch prep.

delivery_systems.name: DF-41 (CSS-X-20, silo)
delivery_systems.description: China's most capable ICBM. 10 MIRVs. Silo deployment ongoing in Gansu/Xinjiang mega-fields.

delivery_systems.name: DF-41 (CSS-X-20, mobile)
delivery_systems.description: Road-mobile DF-41 on 16-axle TEL. Rapid deployment capability, survivable second strike.

delivery_systems.name: DF-31AG (CSS-10 Mod 2)
delivery_systems.description: Road-mobile solid-fuel ICBM. Single warhead. Upgraded from DF-31 with all-terrain TEL.

delivery_systems.name: DF-26 (CSS-18)
delivery_systems.description: Dual-capable IRBM targeting Guam and US Pacific bases. Called 'Guam Killer'. 200+ deployed.

delivery_systems.name: DF-21A (CSS-5 Mod 2)
delivery_systems.description: Theater nuclear MRBM. Targets US regional bases, carrier groups. 80+ nuclear-configured.

delivery_systems.name: DF-17 HGV
delivery_systems.description: Medium-range ballistic missile carrying DF-ZF hypersonic glide vehicle. Mach 5-10 terminal.

delivery_systems.name: JL-2 (CSS-NX-14)
delivery_systems.description: SLBM on Type-094 Jin-class SSBN. 4 boats × 12 tubes = 48 missiles. China's first viable sea-based deterrent.

delivery_systems.name: JL-3 (CSS-NX-20)
delivery_systems.description: Next-gen SLBM for Type-096 Tang-class SSBN. Extended range reaches CONUS from Chinese waters.

delivery_systems.name: H-6N Strategic Bomber
delivery_systems.description: Aerial refueling-capable H-6 bomber variant. Can carry CJ-100 ALCM or DF-21 ballistic missile.
